description:
See Camera.

Used to handle the items for each user for the interactive camera settings.

fields.Control: The root camera control settings panel.
fields._username: The username of the user this item refers to.
fields._voiceDefault: Capture this user's voice as their default voice setting.
fields._voiceMute: Capture this user's voice as the mute voice setting.
fields._voiceShout: Capture this user's voice as the shout voice setting.
fields._voiceBroadcast: Capture this user's voice as the broadcast voice setting.
fields._groupAuto: Set this user's group inclusion and exclusion modes to default.
fields._groupExclude: Set this user's group inclusion to never.
fields._groupInclude: Set this user's group inclusion to always.
fields._cameraOperator: Make this user able to interact with the camera.
fields._framingTarget: Make this user a framing target when framing the scene.
fields._volumeSlider: The user's voice volume when capturing their voice.

methods.OnVoiceDefault: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnVoiceMute: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnVoiceShout: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnVoiceBroadcast: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnGroupExclude: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnGroupAuto: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnGroupInclude: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnToggleOperator: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnSetFramingTarget: A setting changing handler for the panel.
